title: Function Types, Parameters, Overloads, and Callable APIs
description: Refactor status calculations and adapters into callable contracts that preserve inputs, failures, and return relationships. Learners cumulatively produce a callable service transformation toolkit through theory, guided work, debugging, transfer, retrieval, and assessment.
objectives: Model parameter, return, callback, this, and side-effect expectations with readable function types.
Reason about callback parameter compatibility under strictFunctionTypes without accepting unsound narrower handlers.
Model optional, default, rest, tuple-rest, and destructured parameters without ambiguous call shapes.
